sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_atan (value Float64, result Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY value;
INSERT INTO test_atan (value, result) VALUES (1.0, atan(1.0));
UPDATE test_atan SET result = atan(value * 2) WHERE value < 5.0;
SELECT value, atan(result) AS arc_tangent FROM test_atan WHERE result IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_atan WHERE atan(value) > 0;
